InstructionData.Title: HVAC Room Controller 3
InstructionData.Author: Unknown
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # HVAC Room Controller 3 # + cycles atmosphere until room temp matches # HVAC's target temp. # + maintains target pressure of room (~100 kpa) # + supports all vent types #################################################### alias HVACMode d0 # optional
define OfflineMode 0 define NormalMode 1 define VaccumMode 2 define TargetPressure 101 # 101 kpa define K 273.15
define MitterT -693235651 define SensorT -1252983604 define ActiveVentT -1129453144 define SPoweredVentT 938836756 define LPoweredVentT -785498334 define Sensors HASH("ROOM_SENSOR") define InputVents HASH("VENT_IN") define OutputVents HASH("VENT_OUT") define Thermostat HASH("HVAC Thermostat") define WaitPeriod 1 # only run checks every period..
alias hvacMode r1 alias hvacTemp r2 alias roomTemp r3 alias roomPres r4 alias tempDiff r5
loop:
jal poll
# branch to different operational modes... beqal hvacMode OfflineMode runOffline beqal hvacMode NormalMode runNormal beqal hvacMode VaccumMode runVaccum
sleep WaitPeriod
j loop
poll: # load the current/default mode move hvacMode 1 # "normal" is default brdns HVACMode 2 # if device set, override default l hvacMode HVACMode Setting
# load the current "target" temp lbn hvacTemp MitterT Thermostat Setting Average add hvacTemp hvacTemp K # convert to kelvin...
# load the current room temp/pressure lbn roomTemp SensorT Sensors Temperature Average lbn roomPres SensorT Sensors Pressure Average
# take ownership of vents... sbn ActiveVentT InputVents Lock 0 sbn ActiveVentT OutputVents Lock 0 sbn SPoweredVentT InputVents Lock 0 sbn SPoweredVentT OutputVents Lock 0 sbn LPoweredVentT InputVents Lock 0 sbn LPoweredVentT OutputVents Lock 0
j ra
runOffline: # shut it all down... sbn ActiveVentT InputVents On 0 sbn ActiveVentT OutputVents On 0 sbn SPoweredVentT InputVents On 0 sbn SPoweredVentT OutputVents On 0 sbn LPoweredVentT InputVents On 0 sbn LPoweredVentT OutputVents On 0 j ra
runNormal: # check atmos pressure... slt r0 roomPres TargetPressure sbn ActiveVentT InputVents On r0 sbn SPoweredVentT InputVents On r0 sbn LPoweredVentT InputVents On r0 sbn ActiveVentT InputVents Mode 0 sbn SPoweredVentT InputVents Mode 0 sbn LPoweredVentT InputVents Mode 0
# check atmos temperature... sna r0 hvacTemp roomTemp 0.01
# debugging... sub tempDiff hvacTemp roomTemp abs tempDiff tempDiff s db Setting tempDiff
sbn ActiveVentT OutputVents On r0 sbn SPoweredVentT OutputVents On r0 sbn LPoweredVentT OutputVents On r0 sbn ActiveVentT OutputVents Mode 1 sbn SPoweredVentT OutputVents Mode 1 sbn LPoweredVentT OutputVents Mode 1
j ra
runVaccum: # suck it dry... sbn ActiveVentT InputVents On 1 sbn SPoweredVentT InputVents On 1 sbn LPoweredVentT InputVents On 1 sbn ActiveVentT InputVents Mode 1 sbn SPoweredVentT InputVents Mode 1 sbn LPoweredVentT InputVents Mode 1 sbn ActiveVentT OutputVents On 1 sbn SPoweredVentT OutputVents On 1 sbn LPoweredVentT OutputVents On 1 j ra
